title: 安田記念の後に・走りたくなるレース

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky wins a fierce competition with Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Elated after an enjoyable race with her
schoolmate, she decides her next race will be the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Instead of the panic she felt previously, Special
Week becomes filled with motivation while
watching the race.
